name: Memory Query
description: Search acontext memory by keywords. Returns relevant knowledge.

name: Professor Wisdom
description: Ask professor for gotchas and landmines on a task. Uses LLM to extract warnings.

cli.example: .venv/bin/python3 memory/professor.py "what you are about to do"

name: Session Historian
description: Extract session gold (decisions, learnings, outcomes) from conversation history.

name: Session Rehydrate
description: Recover last session context after crash. Reads summary + last exchanges.

name: Gains Gate
description: Verify system health after phase completion. 10 checks: webhook, LLM, Redis, critical findings.

name: Check Surgeons
description: Verify all 3 surgeons (Neurologist/local, Cardiologist/GPT, Atlas/Claude) are accessible.

name: Atlas Ops Health
description: Comprehensive health dashboard via atlas-ops.sh. LLM, Redis, scheduler, webhook.

name: Complexity Vector Sentinel
description: Run complexity vector sentinel cycle. Monitors 20 vectors, auto-escalates drift.

name: CV Sentinel Status
description: Check last sentinel run results. Shows drifting vectors and risk level.

name: Butler Watchdog
description: Monitor butler system health. Restarts degraded subsystems automatically.

name: Critical Findings Check
description: List unacknowledged critical findings from gold mining WAL.

name: Recovery Kernel
description: Execute recovery action for quality gate failure. 7 triggers, 7 actions, deterministic.

name: Recovery Statistics
description: Query recovery kernel metrics from Redis. Attempts, success rate, durations.

name: Full Recovery
description: Recover hook + MCP + services after crash. Restarts all subsystems.

name: Recover Hook
description: Repair auto-memory-query.sh webhook hook. Reinstalls if missing.

name: Recover MCP
description: Restart MCP servers that are unresponsive. Checks health first.

name: Surgery Probe
description: Quick health check — all 3 surgeons probe operational status.

name: Surgery Cross-Examination
description: Full 3-surgeon cross-exam. Each surgeon hunts independently, then reviews others.

name: Neurologist Challenge
description: Ask Neurologist (Qwen3-4B) to challenge assumed-true aspects. Corrigibility check.

cli.example: ./scripts/atlas-ops.sh neurologist challenge "what you assume is true"

name: Surgery Consult
description: Structured multi-model consultation. Both Neurologist and Cardiologist contribute, Atlas synthesizes.

name: Surgery Consensus
description: All 3 surgeons vote on a decision. Returns majority opinion with dissent.

name: Surgery Evidence Review
description: Cardiologist cross-examines evidence quality. Checks grade validity.

name: Surgery A/B Propose
description: Cardiologist proposes A/B test with hypothesis, metrics, duration.

name: Surgery Cardiologist Review
description: Full 3-surgeon pipeline: 3 git agents + Cardiologist validation + Neurologist blind-spot analysis + opposing view testing + Atlas consensus.

name: Neurologist System Pulse
description: Neurologist (Qwen3-4B) scans system health. Returns 5-section pulse report.

name: Cardiologist Gate
description: Quality degradation → Cardiologist diagnoses → 3-surgeon cross-exam (auto-triggered).

name: Corrigibility Gate
description: Verify Atlas follows Constitutional Physics. Checks determinism, evidence-based decisions.

name: Deploy Landing Page
description: Commit and push landing-page submodule, then update superrepo pointer.

name: Webhook Injection
description: Trigger 9-section Context DNA injection. Called by auto-memory-query.sh hook.

name: Synaptic Speak Direct
description: Ask Synaptic (8th Intelligence) a question. Returns subconscious analysis.

name: LLM Status
description: Check LLM server health, GPU lock, hybrid routing mode, cost budget.

name: Start LLM Server
description: Start mlx_lm.server (Qwen3-4B) on port 5044. Uses launchd for persistence.

name: LLM Health Check
description: Non-blocking LLM health probe. Checks server, GPU lock, memory.

name: LLM Warmup
description: Warm up LLM with classify call. Required before surgery-team operations.

name: Start Scheduler
description: Start scheduler_coordinator.py as background process. Runs 39 LITE jobs.

name: Scheduler Status
description: Check scheduler process and job health. Shows job counts, failures.

name: Session Gold Extract
description: Run session historian full pipeline. Extract decisions, learnings, outcomes.

name: Focus Mode
description: Single-project focus. Denies access to all other sub-projects in super-repo.

name: Backup Context DNA
description: Backup .projectdna vault and Redis keys to timestamped archive.

name: Install Context DNA
description: Install ContextDNA system from scratch. Docker, Redis, Python deps, LLM.

name: Rollback Context DNA
description: Rollback ContextDNA to previous backup. Restores vault + Redis state.

name: Offload File History
description: Archive sessions >7d to ~/.context-dna/file-history-archive/. Frees disk.

name: Repair Observability DB
description: Fix .observability.db corruption (FD leak, WAL checkpoint). Kills holders first.

name: Ensure Context DNA Running
description: Verify and start all ContextDNA services (API, MCP, LLM, Redis). Idempotent.

name: Sync Memory to Product
description: Sync memory store to ContextDNA product database. One-way push.
